name: @panzenbaby/pi-secure-extension
description_en: A Pi extension that performs security audits on other extensions before install or update. Uses the currently selected AI model to analyze extension source code against configurable audit rules.
description_zh: 一个 Pi 扩展，在安装或更新前对其他扩展进行安全审计。使用当前选定的 AI 模型根据可配置的审计规则分析扩展源代码
